html:
Exclusive to:

The Mossy Vine is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in the Waterlogged beta. They hang from the canopy of Great Tree Trunks and Above-Average Tree Trunks. They produce Figs. After harvesting, they will regrow a new fig after 20 minutes (2.5 in-game days). They still grow during Winter.

Picking a Fig from a Mossy Vine of a Great Tree Trunk will alert nearby Sea Strider Nests, causing Sea Striders to emerge and swim toward the vine to investigate.

Trivia

  • The code file of Mossy Vine contains two kinds of Hanging Vines from the Hamlet DLC, their code name is "oceanvine_patch".

Gallery

  • Fig concept art from Rhymes With Play #282.[1]
  • Mossy Vine concept art from Rhymes With Play #282.

References

  1. ↑ Rhymes With Play #282
DSTDSRoGSWHam

–Warly
“Wants to give fruit”
–Wormwood
“That's all vine and dandy. Ha!”
–Winona
“A fine enough vine.”
–Wortox
“There some yummy fruit over there!”
–Wurt
“Maybe one of them will turn out to be a snake!”
–Walter
“A vine. Not very noteworthy.”
–Wanda

The '''Mossy Vine''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in the ''[[Don't_Starve_Together/Version_History#Waterlogged_Beta_.28since_July_26.2C_2021.29|Waterlogged]]'' beta. They hang from the canopy of [[Great Tree Trunk]]s and [[Above-Average Tree Trunk]]s. They produce [[Fig]]s. After harvesting, they will regrow a new fig after 20 minutes (2.5 in-game days). They still grow during [[Winter]].

Picking a Fig from a Mossy Vine of a Great Tree Trunk will alert nearby [[Sea Strider Nest]]s, causing [[Sea Strider]]s to emerge and swim toward the vine to investigate.
{{Clear}}

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The code file of Mossy Vine contains two kinds of [[Hanging Vine|Hanging Vines]] from the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, their code name is "oceanvine_patch".
